nodes.label: Skill Directory
nodes.rationale: Each skill should be in its own independent directory to maintain separation and avoid conflicting dependencies

nodes.label: Physics Lottery Module
nodes.rationale: Existing physics engine that provides 3D physical lottery simulation, separate from skill wrapper for maintainability

nodes.label: Monorepo Build System
nodes.rationale: Not used - each skill runs independently, avoiding cross-skill dependency conflicts

nodes.label: Pip Install Command
nodes.rationale: Install requirements only for the skill being used to avoid conflicting package versions across skills

nodes.label: Hyphenated Directory
nodes.rationale: Cannot be imported as Python modules, must execute script files directly

nodes.label: Cache File
nodes.rationale: Downloaded data cached locally to avoid repeated network calls; may become stale if source format changes

nodes.label: Remote CSV Download
nodes.rationale: Downloads lottery data from remote URL, cached locally to prevent repeated downloads

nodes.label: Probability Distribution
nodes.rationale: Uses historical frequency to calculate relative probability for each position candidate numbers

nodes.label: Exclusion Rule
nodes.rationale: Excludes numbers that appeared in the most recent draw for each position

nodes.label: Standard Library Only
nodes.rationale: Uses only urllib.request, csv, collections to keep dependencies minimal

nodes.label: API Authentication
nodes.rationale: Requires login to get access_token before calling news endpoints

nodes.label: Pagination
nodes.rationale: News API returns paginated data, must loop through pages to get all items

nodes.label: Sector Mapping
nodes.rationale: stockList contains sector codes not stock codes, requires mapping to get sector names

nodes.label: Heat Calculation
nodes.rationale: Formula: heat = count * 10 + comments * 2 + shares * 5

nodes.label: Subprocess Call
nodes.rationale: Chosen over direct import to keep physics engine independent and avoid adding dependencies

nodes.label: Physics Engine Timeout
nodes.rationale: Set CLI timeout 60s to prevent indefinite waiting

nodes.label: Code Extraction to External Module
nodes.rationale: Extract skill code from SKILL.md into external Python module for better maintainability

nodes.label: Natural Language Interface
nodes.rationale: Wraps physics_lottery module to provide natural language interface

nodes.label: Golden Cross Signal
nodes.rationale: MA5 crosses above MA20, indicating short-term trend strengthening

nodes.label: Bullish Alignment
nodes.rationale: MA5 > MA10 > MA20 with price above MA5, indicating established uptrend

nodes.label: Performance Hard Constraints
nodes.rationale: Binary storage required, no repeated CSV parsing, vectorized computation, preloaded backtest data, <8GB memory, <2s per day backtest
